headline: Middleburg and Lingerfelt Announce Closing of 390-Unit Class A Development in the Richmond MSA
summary: VIENNA, Va. & RICHMOND, Va., April 29, 2026--Middleburg and Lingerfelt today announced their plans to develop a 390-unit Class A multifamily community in Chesterfield County, Virginia – the fastest-growing county in the state and part of the Richmond MSA. Silas at West Hundred marks Middleburg’s fifth ground-up development in the Richmond area since 2023. Construction on the project is scheduled to begin in April 2026, with initial unit deliveries anticipated in October 2027. Financing was provi

headline: Ex-M&T employee alleges discrimination over gender, sexual orientation
summary: An ex-vice president and commercial branch manager based in Long Island alleges she was “treated as a secondclass citizen” by her boss for being a gay woman.
